card.name: Apocalypse Mage
card.text: — This deals 2 damage to all permanents.

card.name: Guardian
card.text: Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Guardian Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put 1 retaliatory counter on it if you have a permanent with retaliatory in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Ironclad
card.text: Armor (A permanent with armor doesn't take the first 1 damage it would take each turn. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Ironclad Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put 1 armor counter on it if you have a permanent with armor in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with armor doesn't take the first 1 damage it would take each turn. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Knight
card.text: Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Knight Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put 1 brutal counter on it if you have a permanent with brutal in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Mighty Body
card.text: — Put 2 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Mighty Mind
card.text: — Put 3 power counters on one of your permanents.

card.name: Sentinel
card.text: Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Remove 1 power counter from a permanent.

card.name: Sentinel Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put 1 retaliatory counter on it if you have a permanent with retaliatory in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Remove 1 power counter from a permanent.

card.name: Slayer
card.text: Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Remove 1 power counter from a permanent.

card.name: Slayer Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put 1 brutal counter on it if you have a permanent with brutal in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Remove 1 power counter from a permanent.

card.name: Duelist
card.text: Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Put 2 power counters on one of your permanents.

card.name: Ignoble Duelist
card.text: Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Distribute 2 brutal counters among your opponent's permanents. (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.)

card.name: Ignoble Warden
card.text: Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Distribute 2 retaliatory counters among your opponent's permanents. (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.)

card.name: Noble Duelist
card.text: Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Put 1 brutal counter on one of your permanents. (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.)

card.name: Noble Warden
card.text: Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Put 1 retaliatory counter on one of your permanents. (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.)

card.name: Warden
card.text: Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) — Put 2 power counters on one of your permanents.

card.name: Templar
card.text: Armor (A permanent with armor doesn't take the first 1 damage it would take each turn. This stacks.) — Remove 1 power counter from a permanent.

card.name: Templar Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put 1 armor counter on it if you have a permanent with armor in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with armor doesn't take the first 1 damage it would take each turn. This stacks.) — Remove 1 power counter from a permanent.

card.name: Oracle
card.text: — Draw two cards.

card.name: Brute
card.text: Brutal, Brutal (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) —

card.name: Veangent
card.text: Retaliatory, Retaliatory (A permanent with retaliatory deals 1 more damage while defending. This stacks.) —

card.name: Leader
card.text: — Put 1 power counter on each of your permanents.

card.name: Mystic
card.text: When this enters your field, you may discard a card. If you do, manifest. (To manifest, put the top card of your deck into your field.) —

card.name: Gravedigger
card.text: — Put a card from your discard pile into your hand.

card.name: Healer
card.text: — Put a card from your hand onto your field.

card.name: Hunter
card.text: This has brutal while attacking permanents with less power counters than this. (A permanent with brutal deals 1 more damage while attacking. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Lich
card.text: — Discard a card. If you do, put this onto your field with 3 power.

card.name: Necromancer
card.text: — Put a card from your discard pile onto your field.

card.name: Scholar
card.text: — Look at the top three cards of your deck. Put any number of them on the bottom of your deck in any order and the rest on top in any order.

card.name: Sifter
card.text: — Search your deck for a card, reveal it, then shuffle and put it on top.

card.name: Man of Glass
card.text: Fragile, Fragile (A permanent with fragile takes 1 more damage from anything. This stacks.) — Put 1 fragile counter on a permanent. (A permanent with fragile takes 1 more damage from anything. This stacks.)

card.name: Man of Steel
card.text: Armor, Armor (A permanent with armor doesn't take the first 1 damage it would take each turn. This stacks.) —

card.name: Jester
card.text: Fragile (A permanent with fragile takes 1 more damage from anything. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Jester Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put 1 fragile counter on it if you have a permanent with fragile in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with fragile takes 1 more damage from anything. This stacks.) — Put 1 power counter on one of your permanents.

card.name: Rogue Trainee
card.text: When this enters your field, put 1 fragile counter on it if you have a permanent with fragile in your field. Otherwise, put a power counter on this. (A permanent with fragile takes 1 more damage from anything. This stacks.) — Remove 1 power counter from a permanent.

card.name: Rogue
card.text: Fragile (A permanent with fragile takes 1 more damage from anything. This stacks.) — Remove 1 power counter from a permanent.

card.name: Pyromancer
card.text: — This deals 3 damage to a permanent.
